payload.answer: I could not retrieve the article; only a 404/network error is available, so no article content was memorized.
payload.decision: Do not commit the article’s contents to durable memory because the source could not be retrieved. Record only that a fetch was attempted and returned a 404/network error, with the URL appearing malformed.

entity_resolution.reason: The source URL is malformed/inaccessible and no article entity content was retrievable.

payload.intent: Remember an article referenced by a malformed/inaccessible URL, but the fetch failed.

memory_cards.statement: A fetch was attempted for an article at a malformed/inaccessible URL and returned a 404 network error; the article content is unavailable.

details: Source fetch failed with 404 network error.
No durable memory of article content committed.
